markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Hex for AI-driven content marketing and GEO/AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, focusing on editorial/blog content to improve GEO/AEO visibility](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Hex seeks to build a content engine, struggling with focus and scalability across various channels](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [GrowthX's two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint, followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Pricing concerns raised, but justified by comprehensive service replacing multiple tools/agencies](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [End-to-end agency partner with internal AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: 8-week strategy sprint, 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Focus on SEO, GEO strategy, content creation, and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [AI workflows with expert oversight for high-quality, scalable content](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating content for AI Answers and traditional search](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Hex's Content Marketing Challenges

  - [Lack of established content engine or flywheel](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Complex platform serving multiple stakeholders, difficult to explain succinctly](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Current focus on traditional methods: gated content, paid social, SEO](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Struggle with scaling content creation across funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Hesitancy in clearly defining ICP and messaging publicly](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### AI-Driven Content Creation Process

  - [Uses company-specific artifacts (personas, brand voice) to inform AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Continuous updating of knowledge base and artifacts throughout engagement](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Multi-step workflows for research, drafting, fact-checking, and quality evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Potential for custom workflows beyond editorial (e.g., Reddit posting, newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Pricing and Value Proposition

  - [Pricing compared to "classic Bain consulting pricing" by Hex](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [GrowthX justifies cost by replacing multiple tools/agencies (SEO, content marketing, LLM analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Estimated at \~10 cents per word, claimed to be cost-effective compared to alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [8-week initial sprint allows clients to evaluate partnership before 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Competitive Analysis and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to analyze Hex competitors: Sigma, Omni, and Looker](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Tuesday, September 23rd at 4 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=2039.0)
  - [Ashley (Hex CMO) to be included in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare competitive analysis on Sigma, Omni, and Looker](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for 9/23 at 4 PM Pacific with expanded Hex team](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=2039.0)
  - [Hex to internally discuss potential fit and value proposition of GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more focused presentation in next meeting, addressing Hex's specific needs and concerns](https://fathom.video/share/V6AUYHfg9xPiL4xqP51XEQFkBtJPhzth?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
